title: Saudi Arabian Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make fried rice dish inspired by Saudi Arabian cuisine. This gluten-free recipe is perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Arabian Spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Arabian Spices and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cooked chicken and cook until heated through.
Add the fried rice and stir to combine with the chicken and spices.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the rice is heated through.
Stir in the Dulce de Leche and citrus juice.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
